candidates_considered.description: Bulk precipitation accumulated over the aggregation interval (tipping bucket, above canopy at tower)
Bulk precipitation accumulated over the aggregation interval (weighing gauge, field site)

candidates_considered.excluded_reason: Throughfall measures below-canopy precipitation, not total atmospheric precipitation. Does not match schema definition of 'Total precipitation'.

source_selection_decisions.rationale: Schema defines precip_tot_mm as 'Total precipitation'. Both TIPPRE and WEIPRE measure above-canopy bulk precipitation in mm, matching this definition. TIPPRE selected because: (1) it measures the same physical quantity as WEIPRE (above-canopy bulk precipitation); (2) it uses the unified finalQF quality flag (0=pass, 1=fail) consistent with other NEON products, enabling uniform QC; (3) available in parquet format for efficient processing; (4) SECPRE excluded because it uses non-standard QF fields (secPrecipRangeQF/secPrecipSciRvwQF instead of finalQF); (5) THRPRE excluded as throughfall is below-canopy, not total precipitation. WEIPRE is NEON's designated 'Primary Precipitation' (weighing gauge, more accurate in freezing conditions) but uses a different sensor placement philosophy (ground-level field site vs tower-top). The tipping bucket at tower top is analogous to how other RIs (ICOS, TERN) measure precipitation.

airTemp_mean_degC.rationale: NEON TAAT tempTripleMean is the arithmetic mean of triple aspirated air temperature, documented in celsius. Direct match to schema airTemp_mean_degC.

height_m.source: sensor_positions_00003.csv zOffset, joined by siteID + HOR.VER

file_mappings.sensor_position_join: horizontalPosition='000', verticalPosition from data → HOR.VER = '0.{verticalPosition}' in sensor_positions
file_mappings.notes: All TAAT data is at horizontalPosition=000. verticalPosition varies by site (040-080, representing tower levels 4-8).

precip_tot_mm.rationale: NEON TIPPRE precipBulk is bulk precipitation accumulated over 30-min interval, in millimeter. Direct match to schema precip_tot_mm.

height_m.source: sensor_positions_00045.csv zOffset, joined by siteID + HOR.VER

file_mappings.notes: Tipping bucket gauge at tower. horizontalPosition varies (000 for tower, 220/900 for off-tower).

sws_mean_percent.rationale: NEON VSWCMean is volumetric soil water content in cubicCentimetersPerCubicCentimeter (fraction 0-1). Schema requires percent (0-100). Confirmed by data range: max=1.0, mean=0.17.

file_mappings.notes: 8 parquet chunks covering all sites. Multi-depth per soil plot (HOR=plot, VER=depth level 501-508). Preserve all depths.

soilTemp_Mean_degC.rationale: NEON soilTempMean is the arithmetic mean of soil temperature in celsius. Direct match.

file_mappings.notes: 8 CSV chunks (3-4GB each). Must use chunked reading. Multi-depth per soil plot.

sand_percent.rationale: NEON sandTotal is total sand content as percent of <2mm fraction.

file_mappings.notes: Static soil texture data. Depths in source are cm, convert to m. Join with mgp_permegapit for coordinates/elevation.

global_warnings: SWC unit conversion (fraction→percent) is critical - verified from NEON documentation and data range
Soil texture depths are in cm in source, must convert to meters
Soil temp/moisture have multi-depth records - all depths preserved per schema depth column
NEON timestamps are UTC, period-beginning convention
